comment.body:
but, structurally the market is not bearish.
only intraday sell, repricing.
thursday came late.
the levels are working for now.

and i didn't know about the tech news that will come :))
some repricing is happening.

Btw, what you are saying about taking credits for wins... no. i don't. 
I took credits for signaling long at the november bottom, when ppl were panicking here and everywhere.
members are grateful only for the analysis, some of them play short, some of them play long. 
But i could also say that there are some members who come only to criticize me, and they never say "oh this call was super", they take only the wrong calls if any.


you say, "m just saying it ok to also say, this is unexpected from what i expected weekly to happen on friday"
why? I should say only if i would tell ppl only one side: "buy buy buy"
I functionate as an analyst here: laying down the scenarios, if/then, and the key levels and pivots.
if a pivot would play out but the scenario don't, that would be a failure... but having a "personal expectation" is not a sin. 
So i really don't get it.
Oooor, you should also have come on Monday and Tuesday and say "oh nice, everything has played out as you personally expected", and say "oh, nice call in november", just to be symmetric.

Read, what I answered for JFinn.
and once again: don't mix up analysis with prediction

comment.body:
as I keep saying, market is all about catching one move, then leave.
I shorted this contract, when it hit a certain % gain, I locked profit, and set the limit buy order. was closed green. 
below the downside pivot, i bought 0DTE puts, also closed since. 
money was made, no need to stay in anymore.

the more time you spend in the market, the worse chances you will accumulate
